goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'latin american' food and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
The restaurant should be in the 'south'.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'italian' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '1 people' at '18:30' on 'sunday'.
If the booking fails how about '17:30'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel' and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel should 'include free parking'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for 'the same group of people' and '4 nights' starting from 'the same day'.
If the booking fails how about '1 nights'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve latin american food and should be in the moderate price range
The restaurant should be in the south
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves italian food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 1 people at 18:30 on sunday
If the booking fails how about 17:30
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should have a star of 4
The hotel should include free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 4 nights starting from the same day
If the booking fails how about 1 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
